name: multi-publish
description: 多平台内容一键发布 — Monorepo

scripts.test: npm run test -w @multi-publish/rpa-engine -w @multi-publish/shared-utils -w @multi-publish/desktop && npm run test:ai-autonomous-tester
scripts.check:deps: npx depcheck --ignore-dirs=dist,node_modules,.playwright-browsers --ignores=@vitejs/*,vite,app-builder-bin,electron 2>&1 || echo "WARN: depcheck issues found (non-blocking)"
scripts.check:circular: npx madge --warning --circular apps/desktop/electron/main.js 2>&1 || echo "WARN: circular deps found (non-blocking)"
scripts.test:rpa-selectors: cd packages/rpa-engine && npx vitest run tests/platform-selectors.test.js
